name: Excalidraw
description: An open source virtual hand-drawn style whiteboard
compose:
name: slashnode-excalidraw
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/ozencb/excalidraw-persist:0.18.0-persist.7
    container_name: app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '4000'
      NODE_ENV: production
      DB_PATH: /app/data/database.sqlite
    volumes:
      - app_data:/app/data:rw
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4422:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-excalidraw_app_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (excalidraw). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://excalidraw.com/.
